contentBlocks.original:
निश्चय प्रेम प्रतीति तॆ, बिनय करै सनमान ।
तेहि के कारज सकल सुभ, सिद्ध करै हनुमान ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
niśchaya prēma pratīti te, binaya karai sanamāna ।
tēhi kē kāraja sakala subha, siddha karai hanumāna ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Doha (Opening): With sincere love and unwavering trust, one who makes a humble and respectful supplication — all their auspicious purposes Hanumāna fulfills.

contentBlocks.original:
चौपाई
जय हनुमन्त सन्त हितकारी । सुन लीजै प्रभु अरज हमारी ॥
जन के काज बिलम्ब न कीजै । आतुर दौरि महा सुख दीजै ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
chaupāī
jaya hanumanta santa hitakārī । suna lījai prabhu araja hamārī ॥
jana kē kāja bilamba na kījai । ātura dauri mahā sukha dījai ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Chaupai: Victory to Hanumant, the friend of the holy! Hear our prayer, O Lord. Do not delay in your devotee's work — swiftly come running and grant great happiness.

contentBlocks.original:
जैसे कूदि सिन्धु महिपारा । सुरसा बदन पैठि बिस्तारा ॥
आगे जाय लङ्किनी रोका । मारेहु लात गी सुरलोका ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
jaisē kūdi sindhu mahipārā । surasā badana paiṭhi bistārā ॥
āgē jāya laṅkinī rōkā । mārēhu lāta gī suralōkā ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Just as you leaped across the ocean to the other shore, then entered and expanded within the mouth of Surasā — then going forward, blocked by Laṅkinī, you struck her with your foot so she flew to the heavenly realm —

contentBlocks.original:
जाय बिभीषन को सुख दीन्हा । सीता निरखि परमपद लीन्हा ॥
बाग उजारि सिन्धु महं बोरा । अति आतुर जमकातर तोरा ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
jāya bibhīṣana kō sukha dīnhā । sītā nirakhi paramapada līnhā ॥
bāga ujāri sindhu mahaṃ bōrā । ati ātura jamakātara tōrā ॥
contentBlocks.translation: — you went and gave joy to Vibhīṣaṇa; beholding Sītā, you attained the supreme state. You devastated the garden and plunged it in the ocean; in your fierce anger you shattered the iron shackles.

contentBlocks.original:
अक्षय कुमार मारि संहारा । लूम लपेटि लङ्क को जारा ॥
लाह समान लङ्क जरि गी । जय जय धुनि सुरपुर नभ भी ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
akṣaya kumāra māri saṃhārā । lūma lapēṭi laṅka kō jārā ॥
lāha samāna laṅka jari gī । jaya jaya dhuni surapura nabha bhī ॥
contentBlocks.translation: You slew and destroyed Akṣayakumāra; you wound your tail around Laṅkā and burned it. Golden Laṅkā burned like lac; shouts of "Victory! Victory!" filled the heavens and the divine realms.

contentBlocks.original:
अब बिलम्ब केहि कारन स्वामी । कृपा करहु उर अन्तरयामी ॥
जय जय लखन प्रान के दाता । आतुर ह्वै दुख करहु निपाता ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
aba bilamba kēhi kārana svāmī । kṛpā karahu ura antarayāmī ॥
jaya jaya lakhana prāna kē dātā । ātura hvai dukha karahu nipātā ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Why do you delay now, O Lord? Have mercy, O inner witness of the heart! Victory, victory to the giver of Lakṣmaṇa's life — swiftly come and destroy this suffering.

contentBlocks.original:
जै हनुमान जयति बल-सागर । सुर-समूह-समरथ भट-नागर ॥
ॐ हनु हनु हनु हनुमन्त हठीले । बैरिहि मारु बज्र की कीले ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
jai hanumāna jayati bala-sāgara । sura-samūha-samaratha bhaṭa-nāgara ॥
ōṃ hanu hanu hanu hanumanta haṭhīlē । bairihi māru bajra kī kīlē ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Victory to Hanumāna! Hail to the ocean of strength! Able hero among the host of gods — Oṃ hanu hanu hanu Hanumanta haṭhīle (the willful and powerful) — strike the enemy with pegs of lightning!

contentBlocks.original:
ॐ ह्नीं ह्नीं ह्नीं हनुमन्त कपीसा । ॐ हुं हुं हुं हनु अरि उर सीसा ॥
जय अञ्जनि कुमार बलवन्ता । शङ्करसुवन बीर हनुमन्ता ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ōṃ hnīṃ hnīṃ hnīṃ hanumanta kapīsā । ōṃ huṃ huṃ huṃ hanu ari ura sīsā ॥
jaya añjani kumāra balavantā । śaṅkarasuvana bīra hanumantā ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Oṃ Hnīṃ Hnīṃ Hnīṃ Hanumanta Kapīśa! Oṃ Huṃ Huṃ Huṃ — strike the enemy in breast and skull! Victory to the powerful son of Añjanā — Śaṅkara's own offspring, the hero Hanumanta!

contentBlocks.original:
बदन कराल काल-कुल-घालक । राम सहाय सदा प्रतिपालक ॥
भूत, प्रेत, पिसाच निसाचर । अगिन बेताल काल मारी मर ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
badana karāla kāla-kula-ghālaka । rāma sahāya sadā pratipālaka ॥
bhūta, prēta, pisācha nisāchara । agina bētāla kāla mārī mara ॥
contentBlocks.translation: You of the terrible visage, destroyer of the family of Death, ever the protector and cherisher of Rāma — ghosts, pretas (spirits), piśācas, night-wanderers, fiends, vampires, Death itself —

contentBlocks.original:
इन्हें मारु, तोहि सपथ राम की । राखु नाथ मरजाद नाम की ॥
सत्य होहु हरि सपथ पाइ कै । राम दूत धरु मारु धाइ कै ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
inhēṃ māru, tōhi sapatha rāma kī । rākhu nātha marajāda nāma kī ॥
satya hōhu hari sapatha pāi kai । rāma dūta dharu māru dhāi kai ॥
contentBlocks.translation: — strike these! I conjure you by the oath of Rāma. O Lord, protect the honor of your name. Let this oath of Śrī Hari be fulfilled — O messenger of Rāma, rush forward and strike!

contentBlocks.original:
जय जय जय हनुमन्त अगाधा । दुख पावत जन केहि अपराधा ॥
पूजा जप तप नेम अचारा । नहिं जानत कछु दास तुम्हारा ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
jaya jaya jaya hanumanta agādhā । dukha pāvata jana kēhi aparādhā ॥
pūjā japa tapa nēma achārā । nahiṃ jānata kaChu dāsa tumhārā ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Victory, victory, victory to the unfathomable Hanumant! What offense has a devotee committed to suffer like this? Your servant knows nothing of worship, japa, austerity, vows, or conduct.

contentBlocks.original:
बन उपबन मग गिरि गृह माहीम् । तुम्हरे बल हौं डरपत नाहीम् ॥
जनकसुता हरि दास कहावौ । ताकी सपथ बिलम्ब न लावौ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
bana upabana maga giri gṛha māhīm । tumharē bala hauṃ ḍarapata nāhīm ॥
janakasutā hari dāsa kahāvau । tākī sapatha bilamba na lāvau ॥
contentBlocks.translation: By your strength I am not afraid — in forests, sub-forests, on roads, on mountains, in homes. I call myself a servant of Janaka's daughter (Sītā) and Hari — by her oath, do not delay.

contentBlocks.original:
जै जै जै धुनि होत अकासा । सुमिरत होय दुसह दुख नासा ॥
चरन पकरि, कर जोरि मनावौम् । यहि औसर अब केहि गोहरावौम् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
jai jai jai dhuni hōta akāsā । sumirata hōya dusaha dukha nāsā ॥
charana pakari, kara jōri manāvaum । yahi ausara aba kēhi gōharāvaum ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Victory! Victory! Victory! — the chant resounds through the sky. In remembrance of you, unbearable sufferings are destroyed. Grasping your feet, folding my hands, I implore you — at this hour of need, to whom else shall I cry out?

contentBlocks.original:
उठु, उठु, चलु, तोहि राम दुहाई । पायं परौं, कर जोरि मनाई ॥
ॐ चं चं चं चं चपल चलन्ता । ॐ हनु हनु हनु हनु हनुमन्ता ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
uṭhu, uṭhu, chalu, tōhi rāma duhāī । pāyaṃ parauṃ, kara jōri manāī ॥
ōṃ chaṃ chaṃ chaṃ chaṃ chapala chalantā । ōṃ hanu hanu hanu hanu hanumantā ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Rise up, rise up, proceed! I invoke you by Rāma — I fall at your feet, I beg with folded hands. Oṃ caṃ caṃ caṃ caṃ — swift and moving! Oṃ hanu hanu hanu hanu Hanumanta!

contentBlocks.original:
ॐ हं हं हाङ्क देत कपि चञ्चल । ॐ सं सं सहमि पराने खल-दल ॥
अपने जन को तुरत उबारौ । सुमिरत होय आनन्द हमारौ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ōṃ haṃ haṃ hāṅka dēta kapi chañchala । ōṃ saṃ saṃ sahami parānē khala-dala ॥
apanē jana kō turata ubārau । sumirata hōya ānanda hamārau ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Oṃ haṃ haṃ — the restless monkey roars out his battle-cry! Oṃ saṃ saṃ — the wicked band scatters in terror! Swiftly deliver your devotee — in your remembrance our joy arises.

contentBlocks.original:
यह बजरङ्ग-बाण जेहि मारै । ताहि कहौ फिरि कवन उबारै ॥
पाठ करै बजरङ्ग-बाण की । हनुमत रक्षा करै प्रान की ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yaha bajaraṅga-bāṇa jēhi mārai । tāhi kahau phiri kavana ubārai ॥
pāṭha karai bajaraṅga-bāṇa kī । hanumata rakṣā karai prāna kī ॥
contentBlocks.translation: The one upon whom this Bajaraṅga-bāna (Thunderbolt Arrow) strikes — tell me, who can then rescue that one? Whoever recites the Bajaraṅga-bāna — Hanumān protects their very life.

contentBlocks.original:
यह बजरङ्ग बाण जो जापैम् । तासों भूत-प्रेत सब कापैम् ॥
धूप देय जो जपै हमेसा । ताके तन नहिं रहै कलेसा ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yaha bajaraṅga bāṇa jō jāpaim । tāsōṃ bhūta-prēta saba kāpaim ॥
dhūpa dēya jō japai hamēsā । tākē tana nahiṃ rahai kalēsā ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Those who recite this Bajaraṅga-bāna — all ghosts and spirits tremble before them. Whoever offers incense and recites it always — no affliction shall remain in their body.

contentBlocks.original:
दोहा
उर प्रतीति दृढ़, सरन ह्वै, पाठ करै धरि ध्यान ।
बाधा सब हर, करैं सब काम सफल हनुमान ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
dōhā
ura pratīti dṛḍha़, sarana hvai, pāṭha karai dhari dhyāna ।
bādhā saba hara, karaiṃ saba kāma saphala hanumāna ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Doha (Closing): With deep trust in the heart, taking refuge, reciting it with meditation — Hanumāna removes all obstacles and fulfills all purposes.
